texto: Most of his face had been hidden by long, greasy bangs, and he mumbled in a low voice that made him difficult to understand. From what little Kyosuke had been able to make out, Usami had killed one person, but he mostly spent his time at the podium reciting strange names that Kyousuke didn't recognize like Jeffrey Dahmer and Ed Gein... Maybe they're actors?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mizuki Mizushiro: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Most of his face had been hidden by long, greasy bangs, and he mumbled in a low voice that made h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, actors, confusion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de confusion e history.
